creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Wen,

Sorry for the mistake, this is my first port attempt. I realize I
included several 'dirrm' directives that are wrong. I suppose I messed
up with the plist tool. I recreated the pkg-plist package using
this[1] instructions. I also checked manually with a fresh dynare
installation on a linux machine. To be sure which files where
installed.

Does this new pkg-plist look good?

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/plist-autoplist.html
